title: PokeSMP Modpack
description: PokeSMP's Minecraft server Cobblemon Modpack for Fabric.
body:
**Cobblemon Modpack for PokeSMP Minecraft Server**

Embark on a unique adventure with the Cobblemon Modpack, exclusively tailored for the PokeSMP Minecraft server. This carefully curated mod pack not only integrates seamlessly with the PokeSMP server but also enhances your gameplay experience with a myriad of handpicked mods.
The Modpack also contains the PokeSMP server built-in for you to join!

**Installation Made Easy**

To embark on your journey with Cobblemon, simply install the Modrinth App. Unsure how to do it? We've got you covered with a step-by-step [Guide](https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play). It's quick, and easy, and ensures you're ready to dive into the Cobblemon experience in no time.

---

**Modpack Contents**

Explore an extensive list of carefully selected mods, each chosen to contribute a unique element to the Cobblemon experience:

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods.
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - A Pokémon mod.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations.
- [Log Begone](https://modrinth.com/mod/log-begone) - Tell those annoying logs lines to begone!
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person.
- [Clean Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-tooltips) - A small mod improving Tooltips by creating a clean and consistent look!
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs.
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for literal IP server addresses.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Essential hooks for modding with Fabric.
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) - Remove fade out animations in Minecraft
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Modding library for mod developers that provides both NeoForge's & Forge's whole config system to other modding ecosystems.
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Visuality is a simple client-sided cosmetic mod.
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) - A proximity voice chat mod with audio positioning and lots of features.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Adds dynamic lights to Minecraft as the most feature-complete and optimized dynamic lighting mod for Fabric.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft.
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance.
